mnemonics: A.I. STATS: Artificial Intelligence's Statistical Tools Are Supervised
keyPoints: Machine learning is a subfield of Artificial Intelligence (AI) focused on building systems that learn from data.
It is heavily reliant on concepts from Statistics and Probability for making inferences and predictions.
It shares a close relationship with Data Science, often providing the predictive modeling tools for analyzing large datasets.
commonMistakes: Confusing Machine Learning with general AI; ML is a specific approach to achieving AI, not AI itself.
Overlooking the foundational role of statistics, assuming ML is purely a computational discipline.
Using the terms Data Science and Machine Learning interchangeably, when Data Science is a broader field that encompasses ML.
